final:
module RefModule (  
    input clk,  
    input we,  
    input [3:0] addr,  
    input [15:0] din,  
    output reg [15:0] dout  
);  
    reg [15:0] unused_memory [0:15]; // 16x16-bit unused_memory  

    always @(posedge clk) begin  
        if (we) begin  
            unused_memory[addr] <= din; // Write to unused_memory  
        end  
        dout <= unused_memory[addr]; // Read from unused_memory  
    end  
endmodule
